1997October 19, 1997

🇮🇹 Florence, Italy

Resolutions of the plenary meeting of ISO/TC 184/SC 4, Florence, Italy, October 19, 1997 -- October 29, 1997

Meeting URNurn:iso:tc:184:sc:4:meeting:plenary-1997-10-florence-italy

15 Resolutions

353Plenary
Approve Bernd Wenzel as Convener of WG 10
SC4 approves Bernd Wenzel as Convener of WG 10, Technical Architecture.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
352Plenary
Approve Gerald Radack as Convener of WG 3
SC4 approves Gerald Radack as Convener of WG 3, Product Modeling.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
351Plenary
Thank UNINFO host and sponsor for the SC4 meeting in Florence
SC4 thanks its Italian UNINFO host and sponsor for the SC4 meeting in Florence, Italy. Particular thanks go to Carla Sirocchi, Elena Carnevale, Sylvia Carnevale, Jenny Martellini, and Luciano Lauro.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
350Plenary
Direct the parametrics team to number proposed standards as ISO 10303 parts
SC4 directs the parametrics team to number any proposed standards that result from this work as parts of ISO 10303. The 14959 designation shall be retired/recycled.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
349Plenary
Thank Barbara Warthen for her service as Convener of WG 3
SC4 wishes to thank Barbara Warthen for her service to SC4 as Convener of WG 3, Product Modeling.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
348Plenary
Establish a Preliminary Work Item in WG 3 to define AP 203 requirements
SC4 establishes a Preliminary Work Item within WG 3, to perform requirement definition of future editions of AP 203 and appoints Laurence J. McKee as project leader.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
347Plenary
Approve changes to guidelines for abstract test suites
SC4 approves the changes to "Guidelines for the development of abstract test suites" as provided in SC4 N637.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
346Plenary
Approve Julian Fowler as Deputy Convener of the Quality Committee
SC4 approves Julian Fowler as Deputy Convener of the Quality Committee.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
345Plenary
Thank Julian Fowler for his service as Convener of WG 10
SC4 wishes to thank Julian Fowler for his service to SC4 as Convener of WG 10, Technical Architecture.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
344Plenary
Thank Shaun Devlin for his service as Convener of JWG 9
SC4 wishes to thank Shaun Devlin for his service to SC4 as Convener of JWG 9, ISO/IEC Electrical/Electronics Applications.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
343Plenary
Approve Michael Endres as Deputy Convener of WG 12
SC4 approves Michael Endres as Deputy Convener of WG 12, SC4 Common Resources.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
342Plenary
Define normative reference registration requirements for DIS and FDIS
SC4 requires that by the time a part is being registered as a Draft International Standard (DIS) its associated normative references shall also be registered at least as Draft International Standar...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
341Plenary
Cancel Resolution 319 due to lack of leadership and activity
SC4 cancels Resolution 319 due to lack of leadership and activity on these preliminary work items.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
340Plenary
Thank Neal Laurance and endorse Meinolf Groepper as liaison to SC5
SC4 wishes to thank Mr. Neal Laurance for his liaison role with ISO/TC 184/SC 5.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
339Plenary
Approve new project leaders and project editors
SC4 approves the following new project leaders or project editors for the associated SC4 projects: |=== |ISO Project |Project Lead |Document Editor |PWI 10303-220/320 |John DeLoof | |10303-24 |Davi...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
ISO/TC 184/SC 4

Industrial data

Standardization of the content, meaning, structure, representation and quality management of information for engineered products throughout their lifecycle.

Committee

  • Secretariat: ANSI (Secretariat)
  • Chair: Kenneth Swope
  • Established: 1984
  • Standards: 822 published
  • Members: 21 (P), 14 (O)
